name: Black Works Studio Rorschach Robusto
description: The Rorschach Robusto from Black Works Studio showcases a rich San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper over a complex Honduran and Nicaraguan blend, delivering bold dark chocolate and earthy flavors. James Brown crafted this as a medium-full to full-bodied smoke with impressive complexity for its price point.

name: Black Works Studio Rorschach Toro
description: The Rorschach Toro from Black Works Studio gives the dark San Andres Maduro-wrapped blend more time to open up, revealing additional layers of pepper and cedar alongside the core dark chocolate and coffee notes. A fan favorite from James Brown's boutique Black Works Studio line.

name: Black Works Studio Sindustry Robusto
description: The Sindustry Robusto from Black Works Studio is a Nicaraguan-forward blend wrapped in a rustic Habano leaf that delivers classic leathery, peppery notes with an earthy backbone. Produced at the Fabrica Oveja Negra in Estelí, it showcases the bold character James Brown is known for.

name: Black Works Studio Killer Bee Robusto
description: The Killer Bee Robusto from Black Works Studio features an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper that contributes subtle honey and nutty sweetness to a medium-full Honduran and Nicaraguan core. This blend is a more approachable entry point into the Black Works Studio lineup.

name: Black Works Studio Tears of Zeus Toro
description: The Tears of Zeus Toro is one of Black Works Studio's boldest offerings, pairing a Connecticut Broadleaf Maduro wrapper with an all-Nicaraguan blend for an intensely full-bodied experience. Dark chocolate, espresso, and molasses flavors dominate from start to finish.

name: Black Works Studio Sparrow & Lion Robusto
description: The Sparrow & Lion Robusto brings a more accessible medium-bodied option to the Black Works Studio portfolio, wrapped in a smooth Ecuadorian Connecticut Shade leaf. Creamy, nutty, and lightly spiced, it appeals to smokers seeking complexity without overwhelming strength.

name: Black Works Studio Genesis Robusto
description: The Genesis Robusto from Black Works Studio wraps a Honduran Corojo leaf around a spiced Nicaraguan and Honduran blend, producing a medium-full smoke with ripe red pepper, leather, and cedar character. The name reflects James Brown's foundational approach to Honduran tobacco.

name: Black Works Studio Hyena Robusto
description: The Hyena Robusto is a full-bodied beast from Black Works Studio, featuring an all-Nicaraguan puro construction with a rustic Corojo wrapper. Aggressive black pepper, dark chocolate, and leather notes make this a cigar for seasoned full-strength smokers.

name: Principle Accomplice Habano Robusto
description: The Principle Accomplice Habano Robusto is a well-crafted boutique blend combining Ecuadorian Habano wrapper with a Honduran and Nicaraguan filler, offering medium-full body with leather, cedar, and earthy complexity. Principle Cigars operates as a small-batch boutique brand with roots in Honduras.

name: Principle Accomplice Connecticut Robusto
description: The Principle Accomplice Connecticut Robusto pairs a silky Ecuadorian Connecticut Shade wrapper with a balanced Honduran and Nicaraguan filler for a mild-to-medium smoke. Creamy and approachable, it's the entry-level offering from Principle Cigars and suits newer smokers.

name: Principle El Caballero Robusto
description: The Principle El Caballero Robusto is a medium-bodied Nicaraguan-forward blend finished with a Habano wrapper, offering refined cedar, leather, and earthy notes with a creamy finish. This cigar exemplifies Principle's commitment to quality boutique blending.

name: Principle Momento Dios Robusto
description: The Principle Momento Dios Robusto is an all-Nicaraguan puro under a San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper, delivering medium-full dark chocolate, coffee, and molasses flavors with a smooth finish. It is one of the boldest expressions in the Principle Cigars portfolio.

name: Principle Isleño Robusto
description: The Principle Isleño Robusto showcases the unique character of Honduran Corojo tobacco, featuring the native wrapper leaf over a Honduran and Nicaraguan blend for a peppery, earthy, medium-full smoke. This is a tribute to the island heritage of tobacco culture.

name: Principle Cardinal Robusto
description: The Principle Cardinal Robusto blends Nicaraguan Jalapa fillers under an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper for a medium-bodied smoke with smooth leather, cedar, and creamy notes. This is a refined, elegant expression from Principle Cigars ideal for everyday enjoyment.

name: Alec Bradley Sanctum Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Sanctum Robusto is a Honduran-dominant blend featuring local wrapper, binder, and filler alongside Nicaraguan ligero, delivering a complex medium-full smoke with dark fruit, leather, and earthy coffee notes. The Sanctum line is among Alec Bradley's most critically acclaimed.

name: Alec Bradley MChurchill
description: The Alec Bradley MChurchill is a large-format Honduran blend that expands on the Magic Toast recipe, offering an extended smoking experience with evolving leather, dark fruit, and cedar flavors. Its extra length allows the blend to breathe and develop through multiple transitions.

name: Alec Bradley Star Navigator Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Star Navigator Robusto is a medium-bodied Honduran blend designed for everyday enjoyment, combining Jamastran Valley tobacco with Nicaraguan ligero for a balanced, approachable smoke. Cedar, leather, and creamy notes make it a consistent performer.

name: Alec Bradley Medalist Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Medalist Robusto is a mild-to-medium Connecticut Shade-wrapped offering built on a Honduran and Nicaraguan base. Creamy, nutty, and smooth, it is an excellent choice for those seeking a polished everyday cigar without heavy strength.

name: Alec Bradley The Lineage Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Lineage Robusto honors the brand's deep roots in Honduran tobacco, employing a rustic Corojo wrapper over a classic Jamastran Valley and Nicaraguan blend. The result is a medium-full cigar with ripe pepper, leather, and complex earthy character.

name: Alec Bradley SR-71 Toro
description: Named after the legendary reconnaissance aircraft, the Alec Bradley SR-71 Toro is a powerful medium-full blend featuring a San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper over a Honduran and Nicaraguan core. Dark chocolate, coffee, and leather are its signature flavors.

name: Alec Bradley Taste of the Town Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Taste of the Town Robusto is a value-oriented medium-bodied blend featuring Nicaraguan Habano wrapper over Honduran and Nicaraguan tobaccos. A consistent everyday cigar delivering solid cedar, leather, and nutty flavors without breaking the bank.

name: Alec Bradley Gatekeeper Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Gatekeeper Robusto pairs a golden Ecuadorian Habano wrapper with a bold Honduran and Nicaraguan filler blend, producing a medium-full smoke with great leather, earth, and pepper balance. A premium offering from one of Honduras' best-known cigar brands.

name: Espinosa Laranja Reserva Toro
description: The Espinosa Laranja Reserva Toro extends the award-winning Laranja blend in a 6x52 format, showcasing the distinctive Brazilian Arapiraca wrapper that delivers orange peel, dark chocolate, and coffee complexity. One of the most unique and critically acclaimed cigars in Espinosa's portfolio.

name: Espinosa 601 La Bomba Robusto
description: The 601 La Bomba Robusto from Espinosa Cigars lives up to its name with an explosive full-bodied experience, pairing a San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper with a full-strength Nicaraguan blend. Dark chocolate, espresso, and bold black pepper make it one of the most intense cigars in the 601 line.

name: Espinosa Knuckle Sandwich Toro
description: The Espinosa Knuckle Sandwich Toro delivers a punch of flavor with its Nicaraguan Corojo wrapper over a robust Estelí-forward blend. Red pepper, leather, and dark cherry notes are hallmarks of this medium-full blend, which packs serious complexity in a classic 6x52 Toro format.

name: Espinosa Crema No. 7 Toro
description: The Espinosa Crema No. 7 Toro offers a mild-to-medium experience headlined by a silky Ecuadorian Connecticut Shade wrapper over a Nicaraguan filler blend. Creamy, nutty, and laced with honey sweetness, it is the accessible, elegant side of Espinosa's diverse portfolio.

name: Espinosa Murcielago Toro
description: The Espinosa Murcielago Toro (Bat) builds on the Robusto format with greater time to develop its San Andres Maduro-wrapped Nicaraguan and Honduran blend. Dark chocolate, coffee, and leather evolve across the long burn, with a trademark smooth finish from master blender Erik Espinosa.

name: Espinosa Alpha Dawg Gordo
description: The Espinosa Alpha Dawg Gordo expands the bold Nicaraguan Habano-wrapped Alpha Dawg blend into a wide 6x60 format, allowing the full leather, earth, cedar, black pepper, and dark fruit profile to develop slowly over an extended smoke. An impressive showcase of Erik Espinosa's Estelí blending expertise.

name: La Palina Gramercy Toro
description: The La Palina Gramercy Toro is a medium-bodied Nicaraguan blend featuring a natural Habano wrapper, delivering smooth cedar, leather, and earth notes with a creamy cocoa finish. Named after the Gramercy Park neighborhood in New York, it embodies La Palina's premium urban sensibility.

name: La Palina Blue Label Toro
description: The La Palina Blue Label Toro is a mild-to-medium Connecticut Shade-wrapped Nicaraguan blend offering creamy, nutty, and lightly spiced notes ideal for relaxed daytime smoking. Its approachable profile makes it one of La Palina's most popular everyday offerings.

name: La Palina Goldie Lonsdale
description: The La Palina Goldie Lonsdale is a small-batch, limited-production gem featuring Dominican and Nicaraguan tobacco under a silky Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper. Creamy, elegantly spiced, and refined with honey and toasted bread notes, it is among the finest Connecticut Shade cigars produced.

name: La Palina El Diario Toro
description: The La Palina El Diario Toro is a daily-driver medium-full blend under a San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper, offering reliable dark chocolate, coffee, and earth flavors. El Diario (The Daily) is designed for cigar enthusiasts who want a premium Maduro experience at an accessible price.

name: La Palina LP03 Robusto
description: The La Palina LP03 Robusto is a medium-bodied Dominican-forward blend wrapped in Ecuadorian Habano, delivering balanced leather, cedar, and cream notes with earthy undertones. Part of La Palina's numbered LP series showcasing premium small-batch Dominican artistry.

name: La Palina Sunday Smoke Robusto
description: The La Palina Sunday Smoke Robusto is a light-to-medium Connecticut Shade cigar designed for leisurely weekend smoking, offering mild creaminess, cedar, and nutty notes without any harshness. An accessible, value-oriented entry in the La Palina lineup.

name: La Palina Goldie Robusto
description: The La Palina Goldie Robusto is a small-batch limited cigar featuring an ultra-silky Ecuadorian Connecticut wrapper over premium Dominican and Nicaraguan tobaccos. Cream, toasted bread, nuts, and a gentle white pepper finish make it one of La Palina's most celebrated expressions.

name: Room 101 The Great Wall Robusto
description: The Room 101 Great Wall Robusto is a tribute to Asian-inspired aesthetics in Matt Booth's design-forward brand, wrapping Honduran Corojo over a Nicaraguan and Honduran filler blend. Medium-full body with red pepper, leather, and dark fruit character defines this compelling blend.

name: Room 101 New York Robusto
description: The Room 101 New York Robusto pays homage to the city that inspired Matt Booth's eclectic lifestyle brand, featuring an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over a Honduran and Nicaraguan filler blend. Medium-bodied with leather, earth, and cedar notes, it is a polished, accessible cigar.

name: Room 101 Shinigami Robusto
description: Named after the Japanese death deity, the Room 101 Shinigami Robusto is a formidably full-bodied smoke built on an all-Nicaraguan puro under a San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper. Dark chocolate, espresso, and black pepper deliver a powerful but refined experience.

name: Room 101 Uncle Buck Robusto
description: The Room 101 Uncle Buck Robusto features a Connecticut Broadleaf Maduro wrapper over a Honduran and Nicaraguan filler blend, producing a medium-full smoke with cocoa, coffee, and earthy leather notes. The blend is one of Matt Booth's more approachable Maduro expressions.

name: Room 101 Sunbather Toro
description: The Room 101 Sunbather Toro brings the artsy brand's aesthetic to a light-to-medium Connecticut Shade expression, delivering cream, cedar, and nutty flavors perfect for a relaxed outdoor smoke. Matt Booth's design-focused approach extends to the Sunbather's elegant presentation.

name: Cavalier Genève L'Atelier II Toro
description: The Cavalier Genève L'Atelier II Toro is a refined medium-bodied expression from the Swiss boutique brand, featuring an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over a smooth Nicaraguan blend. Cream, cedar, leather, and cocoa notes reflect the brand's European artisan heritage blended with Nicaraguan tobacco mastery.

name: Cavalier Genève C-Series Robusto
description: The Cavalier Genève C-Series Robusto showcases a full Nicaraguan Corojo puro construction, with bold red pepper, leather, and dark cherry notes that reflect the intensity of Corojo tobacco. This Swiss-designed, Nicaragua-made blend exemplifies Cavalier Genève's bold approach to boutique cigar making.

name: Cavalier Genève B52 Robusto
description: The Cavalier Genève B52 Robusto is named after the iconic long-range bomber and delivers a powerful medium-full blend, pairing Ecuadorian Habano wrapper with Nicaraguan and Dominican tobaccos. Leather, dark fruit, and coffee notes define this bold yet elegant Swiss-designed cigar.

name: Cavalier Genève R-Series Robusto
description: The Cavalier Genève R-Series Robusto is a medium-bodied Nicaraguan puro with natural Habano wrapper, presenting polished cedar, leather, and earthy notes with a creamy finish. Part of Cavalier Genève's core lineup, it balances Old World European refinement with New World tobacco strength.

name: Cavalier Genève White II Toro
description: The Cavalier Genève White II Toro is a mild-to-medium Connecticut Shade expression, building on the brand's acclaimed White Series with creamy, nutty, and honey-kissed flavors in a larger format. The Swiss boutique's commitment to refined, elegant blending shines in this approachable Toro.

name: Cavalier Genève Black II Churchill
description: The Cavalier Genève Black II Churchill is a landmark large-format expression from the Swiss boutique brand, pairing a San Andres Mexican Maduro wrapper with all-Nicaraguan tobacco for a long, evolving medium-full smoke. Dark chocolate, coffee, and leather flavors develop beautifully over the extended burn.

name: Room 101 Big Stick Toro
description: The Room 101 Big Stick Toro extends the popular Big Stick blend into a 6x52 format, showcasing the Honduran Corojo wrapper's red pepper and dark fruit character over a complex Honduran and Nicaraguan filler. Matt Booth's flagship blend translates beautifully to the longer Toro vitola.

name: La Palina Gramercy Robusto
description: The La Palina Gramercy Robusto is a medium-bodied Nicaraguan Habano-wrapped blend with smooth cedar, leather, and cocoa notes. Named after the iconic New York park neighborhood, it represents La Palina's approachable yet premium everyday line.

name: Alec Bradley Prensado Robusto
description: The Alec Bradley Prensado Robusto is the box-pressed 5x52 expression of one of the highest-rated cigars ever produced, featuring Guatemalan Habano wrapper over a Honduran and Nicaraguan filler blend. Leather, earth, dark fruit, and coffee flavors make it a cigar of extraordinary complexity.

name: Principle Accomplice Habano Toro
description: The Principle Accomplice Habano Toro extends the Accomplice blend to a larger 6x52 format, allowing the Ecuadorian Habano wrapper and Honduran and Nicaraguan filler to develop additional complexity. Medium-full body with leather, cedar, earth, and a dark fruit finish.

name: Black Works Studio Rorschach Short Robusto
description: The Rorschach Short Robusto packs the same dark San Andres Maduro-wrapped punch as the full-size Rorschach into a compact 4.5x52 format ideal for shorter smoke sessions. Dark chocolate, coffee, and leather notes make this an efficient daily driver from Black Works Studio.

name: Espinosa 601 La Bomba Toro
description: The 601 La Bomba Toro from Espinosa Cigars gives the explosive full-bodied La Bomba blend a longer burn, allowing the San Andres Maduro wrapper and Nicaraguan tobaccos to deliver evolving dark chocolate, espresso, and molasses flavors. An intense powerhouse for full-strength fans.

name: Cavalier Genève Black Series Robusto
description: The Cavalier Genève Black Series Robusto is the Maduro-wrapped counterpart in the brand's core Black Series line, featuring San Andres Maduro wrapper over all-Nicaraguan tobacco. Dark chocolate, coffee, and leather notes define this medium-full Swiss-designed boutique cigar.
